item.title: Genomic comparison and phenotypic characterization of Pseudomonas aeruginosa isolates across environmental and diverse clinical isolation sites
item.description: CP and EB are co-primary authors. CP, JR, and DH are co-corresponding authors.

item.title: Genotype-phenotype modeling of light ecotypes in Prochlorococcus reveals genomic signatures of ecotypic divergence
item.description: EB, CV are co-primary authors who contributed equally.

item.title: From sequence to signature: Uncovering multiscale AMR features across bacterial pathogens with supervised machine learning
item.description: AG, EB, CV, EW are co-primary authors who contributed equally.

item.title: Unlocking antimicrobial resistance with multiomics and machine learning
amR: an R package suite to predict antimicrobial resistance in bacterial pathogens
The phage shock protein (PSP) envelope stress response: discovery of novel partners and evolutionary history
item.description: JR, LA, and MG are co-corresponding authors.

item.title: MolEvolvR: a web-app for characterizing proteins using molecular evolution and phylogeny
item.description: FSA, JTB, LS are co-primary authors who contributed equally; they are listed alphabetically.
